title: Les yeux noirs
writer: Viktor Tourjansky, Robert Thoeren, Jean-Pierre Feydeau
actors: Harry Baur, Simone Simon, Jean-Pierre Aumont
plot: 1913 Russia: when a sheltered daughter is taken by a banker to a restaurant she doesn't know her father works at, she is saved from being seduced and comforts herself later with the more respectable admiration of her piano teacher.
